name: India's Got Latent — Season 2
description: Be part of the live audience for India's most unpredictable talent show. Season 2 promises bigger laughs, wilder acts, and the same underqualified judges.

name: Samay Raina Live
description: An evening of unfiltered comedy, chess trash-talk, and audience roasts. Samay Raina brings his signature chaos to the capital.

name: India's Got Latent — Season 2
description: The latent talent of Bangalore takes the stage. Will the judges be impressed? Probably not. But that's the point.

name: Samay Raina Live
description: Hyderabad, get ready. Samay is back with new material, old grudges, and absolutely no filter.

name: India's Got Latent — Season 2
description: Pune's finest latent talents face the judges. 1 minute 30 seconds. No sob stories. Just chaos.
